name: freeaitokens
description: Plugin-based Playwright library for browser chat platforms
author: Paul Fruitful

scripts.check: node --check index.js && node --check src/errors.js && node --check src/chrome-attach.js && node --check src/playwright.js && node --check src/plugin-registry.js && node --check src/session.js && node --check src/client.js && node --check src/plugins/generic-chat.js && node --check src/plugins/chatgpt-web.js && node --check examples/chatgpt-web-session.js
scripts.test: npm run check && npm run smoke
